# Amazon Q Developer User Guide - Complete Document History

## Overview
This is the document history for the Amazon Q Developer User Guide, tracking all updates from November 28, 2023 (initial preview release) through March 19, 2026.

## Key Updates by Category

### Recent Updates (2026)

| Date | Change |
|------|--------|
| **March 19, 2026** | Builder ID unsubscribe instructions: Added guidance for unsubscribing personal accounts when Amazon Q Developer Profile is deleted, includes steps to re-enable via console and link to create a Kiro Profile |
| **February 18, 2026** | Updated account limit for subscriptions: Maximum increased from 10 to 20 accounts per AWS Region, per organization |
| **January 16, 2026** | Deprecated code transformation for GitLab - `/q transform` quick action and CI/CD pipeline customization removed |
| **January 13, 2026** | Removed deprecated GitLab quick actions (`/q dev (revise)` and `/q test` unit test generation) |

## Note
Last fetched: 2026-03-30. No new entries since March 19, 2026.
